summary: Trigger navigation and its center-line flash on the first frame the locked pinch reaches the midpoint, with a longer visual marker.
scope: After horizontal navigation locks, emit on the first frame at or across x=50% instead of waiting for a second displacement threshold.
Keep the 7% start guard, 4% horizontal intent lock, pre-lock dominance, direction lock and one-shot behavior.
Increase the HUD center flash from 88pt to 176pt while retaining its 240ms glow animation.
Leave vertical scrolling, open-palm paging, pointer clicking and the browser allowlist unchanged.
validation: swift test passed 33 tests including exact-center triggers in both directions
Swift warnings-as-errors and Release builds passed
Strict codesign and installed 0.8.5 build 19 checks passed
notes: The flash still appears only in the full-screen HUD and remains behind the yellow pinch point.
